mapper.select: SELECT RA_ITEM_CD, RA_ITEM_NM, RA_ITEM_TP, MAX_SCR, WGHT, USE_CCD, ORD_NO, REG_DT FROM RA_ITEM ORDER BY ORD_NO ASC
SELECT RA_ITEM_CD, RA_ITEM_NM, RA_ITEM_TP, MAX_SCR, WGHT, USE_CCD, ORD_NO, REG_DT FROM RA_ITEM WHERE USE_CCD = 'Y' ORDER BY ORD_NO ASC
SELECT RA_GRD FROM RA_GRD_STD WHERE #{raScr} >= GRD_SCR_MIN AND #{raScr} <= GRD_SCR_MAX LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RA_RESULT_DTL (RA_ID, RA_ITEM_CD, ITEM_VAL, ITEM_SCR, ITEM_WGHT, ITEM_LST_SCR, REG_DT) VALUES (#{raId}, #{raItemCd}, #{itemVal}, #{itemScr}, #{itemWght}, #{itemLstScr}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT RA_ID, RNMCNO, EVAL_DT, RA_GRD, RA_SCR, EDD_F, NEXT_EVAL_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM RA_RESULT WHERE RA_ID = #{raId}
SELECT RA_DTL_ID, RA_ID, RA_ITEM_CD, ITEM_VAL, ITEM_SCR, ITEM_WGHT, ITEM_LST_SCR, REG_DT FROM RA_RESULT_DTL WHERE RA_ID = #{raId} ORDER BY RA_DTL_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE RA_RESULT SET RA_SCR = #{raScr}, RA_GRD = #{raGrd}, EDD_F = #{eddYn}, NEXT_EVAL_DT = #{nextEvalDt}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE RA_ID = #{raId}
mapper.select: SELECT RA_ID, RNMCNO, EVAL_DT, RA_GRD, RA_SCR, EDD_F, NEXT_EVAL_DT, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM RA_RESULT WHERE RNMCNO = #{custNo} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT 1
